title: Pandemic preparedness and response: Public Health Agency of Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## Pandemic preparedness and response: Public Health Agency of Canada
Provinces and territories have individual plans for pandemic scenarios. Check your provincial or territorial website for more information.
- About Canada's new pandemic preparedness plan
- Canada's role in the international pandemic instrument
- Federal, Provincial, Territorial Public Health Response Plan for Biological Events
- Canadian Pandemic Influenza Preparedness: Planning Guidance for the Health Sector
- International Health Regulations (2005)
- North American Preparedness for Animal and Human Pandemics Initiative
- Declaration of Intent to Coordinate Health Emergency Public Communications (PDF)
- International Health Regulations: Joint External Evaluation of Canada Self-Assessment Report
- Pandemic influenza risk management: A World Health Organization guide to inform and harmonize national and international pandemic preparedness and response

## Public health security
- Wastewater monitoring
- National Emergency Strategic Stockpile
- Health Portfolio Emergency Response Plan
- Bioterrorism and emergency preparedness
- Risk assessments for public health professionals
- Centre for Emergency Preparedness and Response
- Wildfires in Canada: Toolkit for Public Health Authorities
- Science and research priorities: Public Health Agency of Canada
- Public Health Agency of Canada Expert Panel on Mpox in Canada
- Public Health Agency of Canada Expert Panel on Avian Influenza A(H5Nx) in Canada
- Guidance for marine operators: Reporting illness on board
- Food and drinking water safety in an emergency
